problem: Reverse-engineer 64keys.com chart combination features (interaction, penta, multichart, transits) and build comprehensive Human Design ontology to enable ergonomic multi-chart calculations during Rebecca's consultation sessions
goal: Produce actionable specifications for implementing arbitrary chart combinations with Rebecca Energy aesthetic, including complete HD ontology, API design, and chart visualization system

missing: Transit overlays on any chart type

rebecca_workflow.pain_point: During sessions, constantly switches between chart combinations - needs speed and ergonomics
rebecca_workflow.requirement: One-click access to any chart combination from group view

context.exploration_method: MCP server browsing of 64keys.com pages to extract patterns
context.ontology_scope: Comprehensive (types, authorities, profiles, centers, channels, gates, lines, quarters, angles, variables, terminology mappings)
context.color_scheme_goal: Document 64keys palette, propose Rebecca Energy alternative (deep purples, gold/amber, forest greens, earth tones)
context.chart_visualization_goal: Deep understanding of 64keys rendering to inform our own SVG-based system

constraints: Work in git fork space (automatic isolation branch)
Use existing MCP tools (browse_page, analyze_page, get_chart, get_people)
Maintain raw vs semantic separation pattern
All artifacts committed to fork, NOT main branch
success_criteria: Interaction chart logic specified (gate overlap, channel formation, definition calculation)
Complete HD ontology in structured JSON format
Python API design for chart combinations
Color scheme research completed (64keys + Rebecca Energy proposal)
Chart visualization specification detailed enough to implement SVG renderer
All findings enable synthesizing a 'chart expert' agent

1_endpoint_discovery.description: Map 64keys chart-related endpoints and page structures

tasks.task: Use MCP browse_page to explore /chart, /interaction, /penta endpoints. Document URL patterns, query parameters, session requirements.
Use MCP get_people and get_chart to understand how charts are loaded. Document person ID patterns, authentication flow.

2_chart_logic_reverse_engineering.description: Reverse-engineer how 64keys calculates and renders chart combinations

tasks.task: Deep dive into interaction chart logic: how two RawBodyGraphs combine (gate overlap, channel formation, definition calculation). Extract HTML patterns showing composite activations.

Study chart visualization: SVG structure, element positioning, color application, responsive layout, interactive states. Document coordinate systems, visual encoding patterns. GOAL: Expertise to synthesize chart expert agent.

3_ontology_construction.description: Build comprehensive Human Design ontology from existing codebase and 64keys content

tasks.task: Construct HD concept taxonomy from bodygraph.yaml, channels.yaml, centers.yaml, and codebase models. Include types, authorities, profiles, centers, channels, gates, lines, quarters.
Map terminology: 64keys (Initiator, Builder, Specialist, Coordinator, Observer) ↔ traditional HD (Manifestor, Generator, ManGen, Projector, Reflector). Extract from docs and 64keys pages.

4_visual_design_research.description: Research color schemes and visual design patterns

tasks.task: Document 64keys color palette (defined/undefined centers, channels, gates). Research HD standard conventions. Propose Rebecca Energy palette (deep purples, gold/amber, forest greens, earth tones) aligned with whimsical-yet-grounded aesthetic.

5_api_architecture.description: Design Python API for chart combinations

tasks.task: Design API for InteractionChart, PentaChart, TransitOverlay. Maintain raw vs semantic separation. Propose ergonomic builder pattern for Rebecca's workflow. Integration with existing RawBodyGraph architecture.

6_validation.description: Cross-check findings against existing codebase patterns

tasks.task: Validate that API design maintains architectural patterns (raw vs semantic separation, Pydantic models, SwissEph usage). Check that ontology doesn't contradict existing types. Verify feasibility of implementation.

7_synthesis.description: Integrate all findings into actionable implementation plan

tasks.task: Synthesize all phase outputs into coherent plan: (1) 64keys endpoint docs, (2) interaction logic spec, (3) HD ontology, (4) API design, (5) color scheme, (6) chart viz spec. Output implementation roadmap with priorities.
output_sections: Agent Synthesis Guide (for chart expert agent)

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
